title: "What's missing" coverage-gap ledger per release
context: An honest coverage-gap ledger per release documents what the catalog does not yet cover, feeding funding/gap analysis (O6) and keeping claims honest (backlog). Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Author a per-release coverage-gap ledger documenting known missing models, sources, and fields with rationale.
acceptanceCriteria: Ledger lists known coverage gaps (missing models/sources/fields) per release with rationale and provenance for the gap claim.
Distinguishes not-yet-ingested (open, scheduled) from out-of-scope (controlled/reference-only) gaps.
Updated each release and linked from the CHANGELOG; reviewed by maintainer.
